mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM community
writer like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
title like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
content like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE community set hit=hit+1 WHERE num=#{num}
mapper.select: SELECT num, title, writer, CONTENT, hit, reip, cdate, imgn FROM community WHERE num=#{num}
